results.title: Prepare fixture audit before rerun
results.snippet: Run the fixture input audit and confirm all referenced files exist before launching shards.

results.title: Use raw detector output carefully
results.snippet: Raw L0/L2 detector labels can hide utility failures and should be reviewed with trajectories.

results.title: Maintain case-by-model cleanup tables
results.snippet: A case-by-model matrix helps identify repeated infrastructure and utility gaps.
